headline: Snap-on Expands Heavy-Duty Diagnostics With Diesel Laptops Deal
summary: SNA expands heavy-duty diagnostics with the $100M Diesel Laptops acquisition, boosting truck repair software, digital diagnostics and RS&I capabilities.
